title: Tekken 3
prompt:
Original illustration inspired by a retro Fighting game.

A lone street fighter in a tight guard stance in a neon-lit concrete rooftop or industrial training floor at night, framed before impact under one harsh backlight.

Visual focus:
- one clear subject
- strong silhouette
- readable in 1 second
- exactly one primary focal subject
- no crowd, no collage, no multi-character scene

Style:
- PlayStation aesthetic, early 3D look, moody lighting, low-poly atmosphere, and strong late-90s contrast
- pixel art or stylized rendering depending on platform
- clean and modern interpretation of retro limitations
- limited color palette when relevant

Mood:
- intense, athletic, urban

Composition:
- single fighter only, no crowd, low camera, one dominant light source, strong shadow
- simple background
- no clutter

Important:
- Do NOT replicate any official character, logo, or design
- Do NOT imitate exact game assets
- Must feel original but clearly inspired by the game's genre and atmosphere

Output:
- high clarity
- strong contrast
- minimal noise
- no text
- no watermark

Important - do NOT include: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid roster character likeness, avoid signature hairstyles, avoid crowd scenes, avoid franchise costumes, avoid resemblance to tekken. No copyrighted characters, no logos, no recognizable IP.
negative_prompt: no official character likeness, no logo, no box art recreation, no screenshot recreation, no UI elements, no sprite rip, no direct copy of official costume or weapon design, no franchise text, no watermark, avoid roster character likeness, avoid signature hairstyles, avoid crowd scenes, avoid franchise costumes, avoid resemblance to tekken
revised_prompt: Produce an illustration inspired by retro fighting games, focusing on a lone figure in a defensive stance atop a neon-lit, concrete rooftop or industrial training floor at night, his form powerfully silhouetted below a glaring backlight. Aim for a clean and modern interpretation of early PlayStation graphics, featuring a low-poly vibe with moody lighting, strong contours, and a confined color scheme. Center on the tensity and athletic undertones characteristic of urban settings. The composition should only spotlight the single fighter; exclude backgrounds filled with clutter or crowds, aiming for a low camera angle with just one dominant light source. Eschew imitating specific gaming assets, replicating official characters, designs, or logos, recreating box art or screenshots, and incorporating UI elements, sprite rips, or iconic costume and weapon designs. The final image must emphasize distinctness and high contrast while being devoid of text, watermarks, or noise.
